settings.heading: Find the right help without turning support into a sales page
settings.text: Use Support for existing customer help, onboarding questions, service delivery issues, Business NBN support, membership queries and help choosing the right next step.

settings.heading: Route the request clearly
settings.text: Choose the support path that best matches the issue so the request includes the right context from the start.

settings.title: I need to contact support
settings.text: Use this for general support, existing customer help or help choosing the right pathway.

settings.title: I need onboarding or next-step help
settings.text: Use support when a purchased product, service or membership pathway needs intake or setup guidance.

settings.title: I need Business NBN support
settings.text: Check availability and support content for business connectivity pathways.

settings.heading: Include the details support needs to act
settings.text: Include the order, product or service context, the business issue, any deadline, your preferred contact method, and whether the request relates to onboarding, Business NBN, membership or service delivery.
settings.aside_heading: What to include in your request
settings.aside_text: Send the relevant order or product, what is stuck, who is affected, the timing pressure and the outcome you need. Avoid sending sensitive account information through public forms.

settings.heading: Support and fulfilment questions
settings.text: Answers for common support, fulfilment and routing questions.

settings.question: What happens after purchase?
settings.answer: The next step depends on the product. Some items are digital, while others require intake, review, booking, onboarding or manual delivery before completion.

settings.question: How should existing customers ask for help?
settings.answer: Use the contact pathway and include the relevant order, service, product or membership context so support can route the request.

settings.question: What if I do not know which service I need?
settings.answer: Start with Support or Advisory. If the issue needs a scoped project or delivery work, RBP can route you into Consulting or Implementation.

settings.heading: Common next places to go
settings.text: These are real store destinations for support, connectivity, resources and membership context.

settings.title: Membership
settings.text: Member value, benefits and plan options.

settings.heading: Contact support with the context needed to act
settings.text: A clear request helps RBP route the issue to support, onboarding, advisory, implementation or the right product pathway.
